product_overview: A web SaaS for creating, customizing, and tracking dynamic QR codes with analytics and subscription tiers. Users can generate branded QR codes, organize them in folders, view detailed scan analytics, and manage billing via Lemon Squeezy.
core_goals: Enable users to generate and customize QR codes for multiple content types (URL, text, WiFi, contact, event, etc.)
Provide detailed per-QR and global analytics (device, browser, location, time) with Pro-plan enhancements
Offer advanced QR customization options (colors, styles, logos, frames) and protection controls (password, expiration, max scans)
Monetize via tiered subscription plans (Free / Pro / Business) and integrate Lemon Squeezy for checkout and portal
Support a bilingual interface (Spanish default, English) and light/dark themes

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allow a new user to sign up with email and password and complete email confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button to submit -> See success message -> Redirect to /confirm-email
Navigate to /register -> Fill invalid email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button to submit -> See validation errors for invalid fields -> Remain on /register

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users via email/password or Google OAuth and redirect to the dashboard on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Click Google login button for OAuth -> Complete Google OAuth flow -> Redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill wrong password -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials -> Remain on /login

features.name: Password Reset
features.description: Request a password reset email to regain access to an account.
user_flows: Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill email input field -> Click send reset link button -> See success message indicating an email was sent
Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill unknown email input field -> Click send reset link button -> See error feedback indicating email not found or request failed

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Display key stats and recent QR codes on the user's dashboard home.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See total QR codes count -> See active QR codes count -> See today's scan count -> See monthly scan count -> See list of recent QR codes
Navigate to /dashboard while unauthenticated -> See redirect to /login

features.name: QR Code List
features.description: Browse, search, paginate, and perform actions (edit, delete, favorite, toggle active) on QR codes.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/qrs -> View paginated list of QR codes -> Search QR codes by name -> Click on a QR to view details at /dashboard/qrs/[slug]
Navigate to /dashboard/qrs -> Click edit on a QR -> Redirect to /dashboard/qrs/[slug]/edit
Navigate to /dashboard/qrs -> Click delete on a QR -> Confirm delete in modal -> See success toast and QR removed from list
Navigate to /dashboard/qrs -> Click delete on a QR -> Confirm delete in modal -> See error toast if server deletion fails -> QR remains in list

features.name: Create QR Code
features.description: Create a new QR code by selecting type, filling content, customizing appearance, and saving.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/qrs/new -> Select QR type (e.g., URL) -> Fill QR name field -> Fill QR content/data field based on type -> Choose foreground color -> Choose background color -> Select dot style -> Select corner square style -> Select corner dot style -> Toggle gradient and configure colors -> Select frame style and text -> Upload logo image -> Set password protection (optional) -> Set expiration date (optional) -> Set max scan limit (optional) -> Preview QR code in real time -> Click save to create QR code -> Redirect to /dashboard/qrs/[slug]
Navigate to /dashboard/qrs/new -> Fill required fields -> Click save to create QR code -> See plan limit error message (plan enforcement) -> Redirect to /dashboard/billing

features.name: Edit QR Code
features.description: Modify an existing QR's content, style, protection, and settings with live preview.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/qrs/[slug]/edit -> Modify QR name -> Change QR content/data -> Update colors and styles -> Update protection settings -> Preview changes in real time -> Click save to update QR code -> See success toast -> Redirect to /dashboard/qrs/[slug]
Navigate to /dashboard/qrs/[slug]/edit -> Modify fields with invalid data -> Click save to update QR code -> See validation errors for invalid fields -> Remain on /dashboard/qrs/[slug]/edit

features.name: QR Code Analytics (Per-QR)
features.description: Show detailed analytics for a specific QR including trends, demographics, and recent scans with Pro-only exports and world map.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/qrs/[slug]/analytics -> See total scans metric -> See unique visitors metric -> See scan trend area chart -> See device/browser/OS distribution donut charts -> See recent scans table with device and location info -> Click export CSV button to download analytics data (Pro-only)
Navigate to /dashboard/qrs/[slug]/analytics as Free plan user -> Click world map visualization -> See upgrade required message -> Option to go to /dashboard/billing

features.name: Global Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Aggregate analytics across all QRs with charts and world map (Pro feature) and CSV export.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/analytics -> See total scans metric card -> See unique visitors metric card -> See conversion rate radial gauge -> See time-series area chart for scan trends -> See world map with scan density by country (if Pro) -> Click export CSV button -> Download CSV
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics while unauthenticated -> See redirect to /login

features.name: QR Tracking and Redirect
features.description: Handle scanned QR requests via /api/t/[slug], validate QR state, record scan, and redirect to the appropriate destination or error page.
user_flows: Scan QR (client) -> Trigger GET /api/t/[slug] -> Server validates QR is active and not expired and under max scans -> Server parses device from User-Agent -> Server resolves geolocation -> Server records scan -> If iOS device and ios_url set redirect to ios_url, else if Android device and android_url set redirect to android_url, else redirect to main destination URL
Scan QR (client) -> Trigger GET /api/t/[slug] with non-existent slug -> Server returns not found -> Redirect to /qr-not-found
Scan QR (client) -> Trigger GET /api/t/[slug] for expired QR -> Server detects expires_at in the past -> Redirect to /qr-expired
Scan QR (client) -> Trigger GET /api/t/[slug] for inactive QR -> Server detects is_active = false -> Redirect to /qr-inactive
Scan QR (client) -> Trigger GET /api/t/[slug] for QR that reached max scans -> Server detects scan_count >= max_scans -> Redirect to /qr-limit

features.name: Password-Protected QR Gate
features.description: Require a password on a QR before allowing access to the protected destination.
user_flows: Scan QR (client) -> Trigger GET /api/t/[slug] for password-protected QR -> Server redirects to /qr-gate/[slug] -> View password input form -> Enter QR access password -> Submit password for verification -> Server verifies via POST /api/qr-gate -> Redirect to destination URL on correct password

Scan QR (client) -> Trigger GET /api/t/[slug] for password-protected QR -> Server redirects to /qr-gate/[slug] -> View password input form -> Enter incorrect password -> Submit password for verification -> See error on wrong password -> Remain on /qr-gate/[slug]

features.name: Folder Management
features.description: Create, rename, delete folders and assign QR codes to folders for organization.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/qrs -> Click create folder button to open modal -> Fill folder name in modal -> Submit modal to create folder -> See new folder in sidebar -> Click folder -> Redirect to /dashboard/qrs/folder/[slug] to view its QR codes
Navigate to /dashboard/qrs -> Click create folder button to open modal -> Fill duplicate folder name -> Submit modal -> See validation error indicating folder name conflict -> Remain in modal

features.name: Download QR Code
features.description: Download QR codes as PNG or SVG from the list or detail views; SVG export is Pro-only.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/qrs -> Click download button on a QR -> See download modal with format options -> Click PNG button to download as PNG -> Browser downloads PNG file

Navigate to /dashboard/qrs -> Click download button on a QR -> See download modal with format options -> Click SVG button while on Free plan -> See upgrade required message -> Option to go to /dashboard/billing

features.name: Billing and Subscription
features.description: Show current plan, available plans, and enable checkout and portal via Lemon Squeezy integration.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/billing -> View current subscription plan details -> View available plans -> Click upgrade button to start checkout -> POST /api/lemonsqueezy/checkout triggered -> Redirect to Lemon Squeezy checkout
Navigate to /dashboard/billing -> Click manage subscription -> POST /api/lemonsqueezy/portal triggered -> Redirect to Lemon Squeezy customer portal
Navigate to /dashboard/billing -> Click upgrade button -> Checkout API returns error -> See error toast and remain on /dashboard/billing

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and update profile details such as name and email with feedback to the user.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/profile -> View current profile name and email -> Edit profile name -> Submit profile update -> See success toast
Navigate to /dashboard/profile -> Edit profile name with invalid characters -> Submit profile update -> See error toast and remain on /dashboard/profile

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Mark/unmark QR codes as favorites and view the favorites collection.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/qrs -> Click favorite icon on a QR to add to favorites -> Navigate to /dashboard/favorites -> See the favorited QR listed
Navigate to /dashboard/favorites -> Click unfavorite on a QR -> See QR removed from /dashboard/favorites list

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Switch the UI between dark and light modes using next-themes.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click theme toggle button in header/sidebar -> See UI switch between dark and light mode -> Preference persisted client-side

Navigate to /dashboard -> Click theme toggle button in header/sidebar -> See UI switch between dark and light mode -> Reload page -> See theme revert to default if persistence fails (error observation)

tech_stack.ui_library: Hero UI v2 (HeroUI), Tailwind CSS v4

tech_stack.other: Supabase SSR, React Hook Form, Zod, Framer Motion, ApexCharts, react-simple-maps, Sonner, next-themes, Zustand, Lemon Squeezy, qr-code-styling, next-intl

New user registration page
Email confirmation status page after registration
Password reset request page
Public landing/home page
Subscription plans and pricing page
Dashboard home with stats overview and recent QR codes
QR codes list with search, pagination, and folder organization
Create new QR code form
QR code detail view
Edit existing QR code form
Analytics for a specific QR code
View QR codes within a specific folder
Global analytics dashboard with charts and metrics
Favorited QR codes collection
Billing and subscription management
User profile settings
Public view page for active QR content
Password gate for password-protected QR codes
Error page for expired QR codes
Error page for inactive QR codes
Error page for QR codes that have reached their scan limit
Error page for QR codes not found

known_limitations.issue: Billing plan upgrade is UI-configured only via Lemon Squeezy; plan enforcement depends on webhook sync
known_limitations.impact: Plan limits may not be enforced immediately after upgrade until webhook processes

known_limitations.issue: Google OAuth login may require additional Supabase provider configuration in production
known_limitations.impact: Google login button may be shown as placeholder if OAuth is not configured

known_limitations.issue: World map chart and SVG export are Pro-plan-only features
known_limitations.impact: Free plan users will not see world map analytics
